ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio that produced the movie */,
  "domestic_gross" REAL /* Total gross income from domestic box office */,
  "foreign_gross" REAL /* Total gross income from foreign box office */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "total_gross" REAL /* Total gross income combining domestic and foreign earnings */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the movie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Movie rating (e.g., PG-13, R, etc.) */,
  "production_budget" REAL /* Production budget for the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_studio_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_id") REFERENCES studios ("studio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the studio was established */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the studio's headquarters */,
  "parent_company" TEXT /* Parent company of the studio (if applicable) */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the studio was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" TEXT /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office record */,
  "movie_id" TEXT /* ID of the movie */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the box office gross was recorded */,
  "daily_gross" REAL /* Daily gross income for the movie */,
  "theater_count" INTEGER /* Number of theaters the movie was released in on the specified date */,
  "screen_average" REAL /* Average earnings per screen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_records_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "movie_id" TEXT /* ID of the movie associated with the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of marketing campaign (e.g., Online, TV, Print) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Marketing channel used (e.g., social media, television, print, etc.) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions (views or engagements) generated by the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitor_movies" (
  "competitor_movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the competitor movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the competitor movie */,
  "total_gross" REAL /* Total gross income for the competitor movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the competitor movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)
